expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":2},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["OK, I went through everything you sent — there's actually a lot of good stuff here, just spread thin. Here's what I can see:"]},{"type":"List","props":{"items":["Your trip plan (tanzaniamemories.md) — full itinerary, Aug 3–20 2026, Cairo → Arusha → 3-day Suricata Safaris group camping safari, plus Zanzibar after.","The costs spreadsheet — all your expenses, broken down by category, with payment status.","Ngorongoro Conservation Area official tariff PDF — the park fees, vehicle fees, camping fees, all the line items.","That Stone Town courtyard photo — a nice memory from Zanzibar.","Your voice note from the crater — driver Emmanuel, two beaded bracelets from the Maasai lady (~$20–25 / ~35,000 TZS), and that extra ranger tip at the gate (~5,000 TZS cash) that nobody warned you about. You wanted to ask Richard about it before the safari balance payment."]},"children":[]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Right now all of this lives in separate files and a voice note on your phone — not great when you're standing at a gate trying to remember if you already paid something."]},{"type":"Par…
